title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Allen Career Institute - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Allen Career Institute - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Allen Career Institute family as a Curriculum Developer in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Allen Career Institute:
Allen Career Institute is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allen Career Institute!
